title: Add neutral announce routing gradient owner between L2 and gateway app
description: Why this exists: lichen/subsys/lichen/l2 is a reusable subsystem and must not directly call app-private gateway_announce_ingest_verified(); announce processing also needs common peer/gradient ownership using immediate-neighbor metadata, not just gateway location ingestion. What needs to be done: create a neutral announce/routing subsystem API that accepts authenticated raw announce payload plus immediate-neighbor metadata, updates TOFU/peer/gradient state, and lets the gateway app consume verified app_data coordinates through its existing policy-gated network-location ingestion. Cover no-hardware native_sim tests; chain physical RF validation separately.
